parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO s_euro_stat.fx_rates (base_currency, target_currency, rate, rate_date)
VALUES ('{{ $json.base_currency }}', '{{ $json.target_currency }}', {{ $json.rate }}, '{{ $json.rate_date }}')
ON CONFLICT (base_currency, target_currency, rate_date)
DO UPDATE SET rate = EXCLUDED.rate;
